articles.author: Tim Fernholz
articles.title: Anthropic took down thousands of GitHub repos trying to yank its leaked source code — a move the company says was an accident - TechCrunch
articles.description: Anthropic executives said it was an accident and retracted the bulk of the takedown notices.
articles.content:
Anthropic accidentally caused thousands of code repositories on GitHub to be taken down while trying to pull copies of its most popular product’s source code off the internet.
On Tuesday, a software… [+1510 chars]

articles.title: NVIDIA Launches Auto Shader Compilation for Faster Game Loading and Less Stuttering - TechPowerUp
articles.description: The NVIDIA App update today introduced some interesting features, such as DLSS 4.5 dynamic multi-frame generation and a 6x mode. Additionally, the app now includes a new beta version of NVIDIA Auto Shader Compilation (ASC). This feature takes DirectX 12 shade…
articles.content: chrcolukNvidia taking matters in to its own hands, a useful feature, Dev's should be doing this themselves on games they release.Since I dont want this app, hopefully a 3rd party tool implements it.… [+1109 chars]
